125.name: Stocko Connectors, Connector Systems
125.description:
Secure Connections

Stocko Connectors ensure secure and advanced connections with the future in a wide range of industries and areas of application.

Streching from domestic appliances and heating industries, the automotive sector, industrial and entertainment electronics, into control equipment and machine building, right into the sectors multimedia and telecommunications.
